title: Faithful Serif
description: Faithful texture pack only. Transforms Minecraft's monospace font into an elegant serif font.
body:
## **About**
This font addon/resource pack replaces the standard monospace Latin alphabet with a sophisticated serif style. It has anti-aliasing for smoother and cleaner text. This pack elevates the visual appeal of your game, making it ideal for medieval, fantasy, or storytelling-themed modpacks. Whether you're exploring ancient ruins, crafting tales of epic quests, or simply wanting a fresh look for your text interface, Faithful Serif brings a touch of elegance and readability to your world.

Give Minecraft the timeless charm of serif typography with **Faithful Serif**, complete with anti-aliasing for a polished, professional finish. Perfect for creative and fantasy-driven players. 

## **Compatibility**
- This pack is designed with the Faithful texture pack in mind. You can still use it with the default texture pack just fine, but the text will look higher quality than the rest of the UI. Install it on top of the Faithful texture pack so that it will work.
- This may not work for mods or texture packs that modify the font rendering or include their own fonts.
- Works best for mods that have a Faithful version of their textures.

## **Credits**
- This pack is the Faithful version of bebebea_loste's [Serified Fonts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/serified-font). Check out their other works as well!
- Faithful Team (I am one of the contributors and addon makers)
- [Faithful 32x](https://faithfulpack.net/)

## **Other Projects**
- [New Faithful Overlays](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-faithful-overlays)

## **Links**
- [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-serif)

## **Donations**
- [Paypal](https://paypal.me/ShaneLouiseB78?country.x=PH&locale.x=en_US)

I would appreciate donations if possible. The money I receive will be spent on a new computer so I can work on these projects much faster.
